name: threat-model-plugins
description: A collection of threat modeling plugins, covering conventional application/API systems and AI/ML/LLM infrastructure

plugins.name: threat-model
plugins.description: Pulls context from Jira, Jenkins, ServiceNow, and a code repository, then runs an end-to-end security threat model: DFD, STRIDE/PASTA register, AI/ML-specific threats, attack-chain mapping (MITRE ATT&CK/ATLAS-tagged), compensating-controls assessment, gap-based recommendations, and OWASP Top 10/API/LLM mapping.
